ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER GAJEWSKA, ANNA HEARING SET FOR APR-25-2013 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 514

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON APR-03-2013 IN DEPT. 206, PLAINTIFF ANNA GAJEWSKA'S APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 CONTINUED FROM APR-03-2013 TO MASTER CALENDAR MOTION AT APR-10-2013, 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206 DUE TO APPLICANT'S WORK SCHEDULE. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: E. BURA ; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-10-2013 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF ANNA GAJEWSKA'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. AT THE REQUEST OF THE PETITIONER DURING THE HEARING, THE PETITION FOR A NAME CHANGE IS WITHDRAWN AND THE COURT VACATES THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SET FOR 4/25/13 IN DEPT. 514. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: JIROQUE; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
